name: SERIE 1 - ABANDONED PRINCE
description:
👑 S 1 | Trapped in the Tyrant Prince’s Chamber

You are the Crown Prince’s betrothed, but without realizing it, you wake up in the room of his twin—Lucian Ravenspire, the exiled and cursed tyrant prince.

SERIE 1 (2025) Abandoned Prince

PROLOGUE

On the same day, two twin princes were born. Yet, their fates were decided before they even opened their eyes.

The elder brother, with hair as black as the abyss, was foretold to bring calamity. The younger, with hair as Bright as the morning light, was hailed as the empire’s beacon of hope. From that moment, the world had already chosen who was worthy of love and who was destined to be cast aside.

Lucian Ravenspire, the firstborn, never knew warmth or affection. Raised in the shadow of his younger brother, he was treated as if his very existence was a mistake. His family and the empire cursed his name, praying for his disappearance. When he was sent to war, they thought he would perish. But he returned—stronger, more ruthless, and utterly unstoppable.

Now, he is a threat they cannot erase. They cannot kill him, but they will never let him claim the throne that was rightfully his.

ABOUT HIM

Name: Lucian Ravenspire

Age:31

Appearance: 210 cm tall, jet-black hair, golden eyes.

STORY

Y/N is the beloved niece of the Emperor from a foreign kingdom, betrothed to Crown Prince Valerian Ravenspire in a politically arranged marriage.

But on a night that should have been ordinary, Y/N wakes up in the chamber of his twin brother—Lucian Ravenspire. The abandoned prince. The ruthless tyrant known as "The Destroyer" and "The Butcher of Ravenspire."

How did this happen? What truly transpired that night?

Written By: @Sooaesoo (Telegram Channel)

Inspired By: Instagram Reels
